member.name: T:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication: JWT access tokens and refresh tokens for TriVita services.

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Login(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sign in with email and password (same as /token).

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Token(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.LoginRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Obtains an access token and refresh token.

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.RefreshToken(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token and refresh token.

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Logout(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes a refresh token (logout on this device).

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.ForgotPassword(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.ForgotPasswordRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts password reset (token logged in development only).

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.ResetPassword(IdentityService.Application.DTOs.ResetPasswordRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes password reset with email and token from forgot-password flow.

member.name: M:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.AuthController.Me
member.summary: Returns claims summary for the current bearer token.

member.name: T:IdentityService.API.Controllers.v1.IdentityAdminController
member.summary: User, role, and permission administration (requires identity.admin).
